text:
There once was a town called Whiskersdale. People came from all over just to visit. It was famous for its feline inhabitants. Cats wore hats and sat in judge chairs.

So, it just so happened that there was an ancient tree in the town square that housed a kitty kitty crystal inside its heartwood. The crystal could grant anyone three wishes, but only once. Not just any wish mind you, but something quite specific.

A family lived in the old farmhouse at the edge of town. Mama Sue used to gaze longingly at the crystal. She wished it would grant her three wishes so the family wouldn't always be poor. Her first wish was for a library full of comic books. That came true. Her second was for a big backyard maze shaped like a cat. They loved playing hide-and-seek. Her third wish was for twins. They grew up to be cat experts and saved Whiskersdale many times over.

There ended the tale of the wishing kitty in
